name: py-tools
description: Use the Windows py launcher from Codex tasks and keep small Python helpers inside the plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Run small Python helpers through the Windows py launcher
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill for Python-oriented tasks on Windows and ships a thin PowerShell wrapper plus a demo script so py-based workflows have a consistent entry point.
defaultPrompt: Run a small Python helper through the Windows py launcher
Inspect the local Python runtime and environment
Use py for quick data processing in this workspace
